title: Create DF
description: Define a basic data frame with columns for Name and Age.
problemStatement:
The analytic workhorse! Create a data frame `df` with columns `Name=c("A", "B")` and `Age=c(20, 30)`. Print the data frame.

**Requirement:** Use the `data.frame()` function.
hints: Data frames are like spreadsheets or SQL tables.
